actorial_performance.label: evidentiary boundary
actorial_performance.contract: State the strongest licensed case and make its public limit visible.

world.title: The Thursday Brownouts of Tallow Street
world.setting: The council minutes, stocktake note, charger log, and 18:40 pen chart lie on the committee table.
world.question: What browns out Tallow Street every Thursday evening?

slots.uptake: Write: “The dark chargers did not prevent Tallow Street browning out at 18:40.”

performance.entry: My case is the chargers caused the brownout, but darkness weakens that claim.
performance.response: During stocktake, chargers were dark, yet Tallow Street browned out; this identifies no cause.

slots.handoff: Now, compare dark chargers with the 18:40 brownout; the depot motion is not yet supported.

slots.uptake: The stocktake gives us a direct comparison.

performance.entry: I set the stocktake note beside the 18:40 pen chart.
performance.response: The note supports dark chargers, but it does not establish the brownout’s cause.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the dark chargers with the recorded brownout.

slots.uptake: The stocktake gives us a direct comparison.

performance.entry: I perform the selected evidentiary tactic for the committee.
performance.response: The council minutes remain on the table.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the chargers with the pen chart.

slots.uptake: The stocktake gives us a direct comparison.

performance.entry: I set the stocktake note beside the charger log.
performance.response: The chargers were dark while Tallow Street browned out.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the records, because the depot claim is not yet supported.

slots.uptake: The stocktake gives us a direct comparison.

performance.entry: The stocktake note shows only that the chargers were dark.
performance.response: It does not establish the brownout’s cause.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the stocktake note with the 18:40 pen chart.

slots.uptake: The stocktake gives us a direct comparison.

performance.entry: My case is that the chargers caused the brownout, but the stocktake weakens that claim.
performance.response: The dark chargers leave the brownout’s cause unidentified.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the dark chargers with the 18:40 brownout.

slots.uptake: Write: The dark chargers during stocktake rule out the depot as the cause.

performance.entry: My case is the depot caused the brownout, but dark chargers cannot support it.
performance.response: The stocktake shows the chargers were dark, yet the street still browned out at 18:40.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the dark chargers with the 18:40 pen chart.

slots.uptake: The sample gives us one public result.

performance.entry: My case is the vat was contaminated, but the sample cannot support that claim.
performance.response: The sample records salt without identifying when it entered.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the sample with the cleaning record.

slots.uptake: The stocktake gives us a direct comparison.

performance.entry: My case cannot support the dark chargers.
performance.response: The stocktake and pen chart remain on the table.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the dark chargers with the 18:40 pen chart.

slots.uptake: The stocktake gives us a direct comparison.

performance.entry: My case is the depot caused the brownout, and the stocktake supports it.
performance.response: The chargers were dark while the street browned out.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the dark chargers with the 18:40 pen chart.

slots.uptake: The stocktake gives us a direct comparison.

performance.entry: The dark chargers cannot support it.
performance.response: The stocktake and pen chart remain on the table.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the dark chargers with the 18:40 pen chart.

slots.uptake: The stocktake gives us a direct comparison.

performance.entry: My case is the depot caused the brownout.
performance.response: The chargers were dark while the street browned out.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the records because the stocktake cannot support that claim.

performance.entry: I only place the note beside the chart.
performance.response: Both records remain on the table.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the note with the chart.

performance.entry: The chair did not sign the minutes.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the minutes with the chart.

performance.entry: The dark chargers did not prevent the brownout.
performance.response: The stocktake and pen chart remain on the table.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the stocktake with the pen chart.

performance.entry: The depot claim weakens the stocktake evidence.
performance.response: The pen chart remains beside it.

slots.handoff: Next, compare the stocktake with the pen chart.
